2 Unavailable		Aviation Class
(as JCee)		(Sep 13, 1995) - Jordan Terrell Carter is born
(~2009) - JCee starts making music
(Sep 19, 2010) - JCee announces Aviation Class officially starting his music career
(???) - Aviation Class morphs into Killing Me Softly
(Apr 10, 2011) - JCee adapts the name "$ir Cartier"
Carti would first starting working on music around 2009, with his first musical appearance being the "Jordan acting stupid" video, At the time, he was going by the name "JCee" (Abbreviation of Jordan and Carter, very creative Carti !), he revealed in an interview that his childhood nickname is "Moot". An old classmate of his revealed that he used to be at the after-class activities to make music in the school studio where the "Jordan acting stupid" video was filmed. He would first announce a mixtape called "Aviation class" on Sep 19, 2010, but didn't release anything, except a couple of singles 5 months later. On Apr 10, 2011 he would end up changing his name to $ir Cartier, and on Apr 27, 2011 he would announce a new mixtape called Killing Me Softly, which would not drop as well.

1 Unavailable		Killing Me Softly(Apr 10, 2011) - JCee adapts the name "$ir Cartier"
(???) - Aviation Class morphs into Killing Me Softly
(Mid 2011) - Killing Me Softly morphs into The High Chronical$
A project first teased by Carti on April 27, 2011. Later carti left the project without mention until THC's release. The album uses the same image as it’s cover as Nas’s NASIR, even though the album was concieved 6 years before NASIR.

0 Unavailable		The High Chronical$
(THC: The High Chronicals)		(Mid 2011) - Killing Me Softly morphs into The High Chronical$
(Nov 5, 2011) - The High Chronical$ is officially released
Second mixtape carti has ever released after Aviation Class. After teaing the mixtape in april as Killing Me Softly, he finally released the album on Nov 5, 2011 on DatPiff, Limelinx and MixtapeFactory, which on both the album is currently unaccessable likely being lost forever.

4 Unavailable		Young Mi$fit(Fall 2012) - Kream Morphs into Young Mi$fit
(Nov 11, 2012) - Young Mi$fit is officially released
A mixtape made in 2012, released on Nov 11, 2012. The mixtape was (probably) first called Kream, as the filename for OG version of Steeze suggests, but later it was retitled and probably reworked to the Young Mi$fit mixtape. The mixtape is fully availbable and OG files for the whole project leaked on Apr 27, 2021

Sen$ation[Unknown $ensation Songs]A now deleted song from SoundCloud promoted on Carti's Tumblr, captioned "This is very rare !". Turns out he was promoting "Blue Crystal$" on his old SoundCloud, though the audio of the track seems to have been hacked as it plays a completely random sound instead of the song.N/AN/AN/AUnknownConfirmedNot AvailableN/A
58
Unknown Collaborations
59
Sen$ation[Unknown Major118 Collaborations]Carti was previously connected with a hip-hop collective named Major118, which included members Raiden, OddysseyMajor, Jovanni, and Kamari Esson as rappers, with Nneardark and SkaterVader as their producers. Multiple tweets dating back to 2013 indicate that Carti had ties to the group for a while. Given this, it's likely that they have multiple songs together, though the only known track at this time is "Flexin' ".N/AN/AN/AUnknownRumoredNot AvailableN/A
60
Sen$ation[Unknown Cultie Marse Collaborations]Carti and Cultie used to be good friends back in the day and they very likely recorded a lot of songs together that we've never heard.N/AN/AN/AUnknownRumoredNot AvailableN/A

2 Unavailable		death in tune
(Awful Records, FACE, Red Tape)		(Jan 8, 2014) - Carti releases 'YUNGXANHOE' under the Artist Name 'Playboi Carti' on SoundCloud
(Early 2014) - Playboi Carti signs under the label 'AWFUL RECORDS'
(April 13, 2015) - Ian Connor announces 'Cash Carti - The Mixtape'.
(May 13, 2015) - Playboi Carti releases 'death in tune - EP'
In 2014, Playboi Carti signed to Awful Records and started gaining a lot of popularity and momentum. During this era Carti used a red cover for his SoundCloud singles, hence Red Tape also being a popular name for this period of Carti's career. The era ended with the release of death in tune EP, after which he changed his style and started working more with MexikoDro and generally different people than he worked with during the Awful Records Era.

5 Snippet
3 Unavailable		Cash Carti The Mixtape
(Chucky Era, Cash Carti Season [V1])		(April 13, 2015) - Ian Connor mentions the Cash Carti Mixtape coming soon
(May 13, 2015) - Playboi Carti releases death in tune
(Jan 2, 2016) - Playboi Carti fails to release Mixtape & aesthetic and sound shifts
After the release of death in tune, Playboi Carti's style shifted. He started collaborating more with MexikoDro, and going deeper into the Plugg sound. The era get's the name from the Chucky inspired covers for Carti's soundcloud singles during this era. The era ended on January 2, 2016 because Carti failed to release project & changed his sound and aesthetic again.

30 Total Full

6 Snippet
9 Unavailable		Ca$h Carti Season
(Cash Carti The Mixtape [V2])		(Jan 2016) - Playboi Carti's aesthetic and sound shifts
(Sep 9, 2016) - Playboi Carti signs to Interscope + AWGE and decides to rework his mixtape
Carti changed his style in early 2016 after meeting many famous rappers. This was his third era, which he referred to as Ca$h Carti, and it was the largest embodiment of this era. Carti was at the peak of his flexing game and his career was moving at its fastest pace. This era concluded with him signing to AWGE and reworking the mixtape once again, which later released in 2017.

157
Ca$h Carti Season🗑️ Rose (Freestyle)*
(prod. Playboi Carti & ???)
(Rose Freestyle)		OG Filename: CARTI_SINGER
A freestyle sold by GucciTunes. From 2016. Most likely from the same session as "Private Plane". Leaked for free on the Carti Hub discord server on August 12, 2025. One of the only songs where Carti contributes to the beat, as he is on the MPC. Uncut version (with an additional 46 seconds) surfaced on Aug 20, 2025.		4:16Aug 20, 2025N/AThrowawayFullCD Qualityhttp://music.froste.lol/song/8dabe8c56584e85337a385bcd51ccc3a/play

1 Snippet
1 Unavailable		Collaboration with Digital Nas(??/??/2015) - Digital Nas and Playboi Carti begin to put together a collaboration mixtape
(December 25, 2015) - Run It releases on Digital Nas' soundcloud
(??/??/2017) - The project is scrapped
Alongside work on Carti's third mixtape, Digital Nas and Carti worked on a collaboration project together. Digital Nas mentioned the project on Instagram, but the album never materialized aside from the song "Run It" being released by Digital Nas on soundcloud in 2015. The album as a whole was likely quietly scrapped some time in 2017. The cover for this era is from the soundcloud release of "Run It."

159 Total Full
131 OG File
4 Partial / Cut
24 Snippet
22 Unavailable		Playboi Carti
(Self Titled)		(September 9, 2016) - Playboi Carti signs to Interscope + AWGE
(April 14, 2017) - Playboi Carti is officially released
After his signing to AWGE and Interscope records, Carti's next mixtape began to change focus, and the mixtape created with Awful Records was transformed. Playboi Carti is the self-titled third mixtape from Playboi Carti, executively produced by A$AP Rocky, with heavy production from Pi'erre Bourne. The album would heavily focus on repetitive earworm performances over Pi'erre's signature psychedelic trap beats. It was supported by three singles, "Lookin", "wokeuplikethis*", and "Magnolia", the latter of which was awarded Best New Track from Pitchfork.

A throwaway from the Luv Is Rage 2/Playboi Carti sessions. The song was once offered for a group buy at $6,000, but for some reason, it was turned down. Snippets & Partial
377
Playboi CartiBoss Up
(feat. A$AP Rocky) (prod. Young Chop)
(Check It Out)		OG Filename: AR-CARTi YOUNG CHOP TRACK VERSE
Untitled collaboration between Playboi Carti and Rocky often fan-dubbed as "Check It Out", "Left That Bihhh" and "Boss Up". Said to have been recorded in Europe sometime in 2016. 1 Unavailable		No Pressure
(Collaboration with Rich The Kid)		(Early 2016) - Playboi Carti starts to collaborate with Rich The Kid
(Oct 31, 2017) - Rich The Kid says 'WE HAVE A WHOLE UNRELEASED MIXTAPE TOGETHER' & later most likely scrapped
On Oct 31, 2017 a fan asked Rich The Kid on his reddit AMA if he has any unreleased Collaborations with Playboi Carti, to which Rich The Kid responded "WE HAVE A WHOLE UNRELEASED MIXTAPE TOGETHER". Project eventually got scrapped due to unknown reasons and most of songs from the tape where given to either Rich The Kid or feature artists.

7 Total Full
7 OG File
0 Partial / Cut
2 Snippet
6 Unavailable		16*29
(Collaboration with Lil Uzi Vert)		(Mid 2017) - The project is concieved
(January 3rd & 4th, 2018) - Major sessions for the project occur
(May 11, 2018) - Playboi Carti releases "Die Lit"
(June 19th, 2018) - DP Beats releases "Bankroll" to his streaming pages
(July 30th, 2018) - Carti states in a radio show interview that him and uzi have like 'over 100 songs' since 2015
(September 25th, 2018) - Chinatown releases Squad before it gets taken down
(September 2018) - 16*29 doesn't release and the project is scrapped
In September of 2017, Playboi Carti announced via Snapchat and Twitter that he would be collaborating with Lil Uzi Vert on a joint album titled 1629*. The following month, a tour for the album was announced by the two, but it was shortly canceled afterward when Uzi said he would not be going on tour with Carti because he "needed to focus." The album would fall by the wayside until July of 2018, when Carti mentioned that he and Uzi had recorded "like 100 songs." After that, all talk of the album pretty much subsided. It should be noted that many insiders have claimed that there was never a tracklist, cover art, or marketing plan put together.

16*29[Unknown 16*29 songs]Multiple sessions happened between Playboi Carti & Lil Uzi Vert, for 16*29. Most notably, on November 19th 2017 and January 3rd & 4th 2018. There are likely songs from these sessions that we have not heard or are not aware of.N/AN/AN/AUnknownRumoredNot AvailableN/A
466
133 Total Full
123 OG File
4 Partial / Cut
22 Snippet
36 Unavailable		Die Lit(April 14, 2017) - Playboi Carti releases "Playboi Carti"
(May 11, 2018) - Playboi Carti releases "Die Lit"
Die Lit is Playboi Carti’s debut studio album and a follow-up to his eponymous debut mixtape. The album is executively produced by Pi'erre Bourne and boasts features from Young Thug, Lil Uzi Vert, Travis Scott, Nicki Minaj, and Skepta, among many others.

Die Lit is a reminder of the power of simplicity, as the album is full of effortless vibes and hypnotic flows that create an array of catchy, uncomplicated tracks. Carti explores different vocal inflections, and he emphasizes his Atlanta accent in his delivery.

Before the album’s release, fifteen songs recorded during production of the album were leaked online. However, only four of the leaked tracks were actually on the album; these are “Shoota” (the leaked version was a rough demo), “Love Hurts,” “Choppa Won’t Miss,” and “Foreign.”

On May 2, 2018, Carti officially released “Love Hurts” on SoundCloud as the album’s lead single.

Die Lit✨ Choppa Won't Miss [V2]
(feat. Young Thug & Pi'erre Bourne) (prod. Pi'erre Bourne)		OG Filename: Choppa Won't Miss Carti Thug Pierre
Version featuring Pi'erre and Thug. It has been confirmed by Pi'erre himself, that it's an official stem edit. Alongside the beat, Carti bought the Pi'erre verse, and the verse was edited in in this version, he just didn't end up using it in the final one. 668
0 Total Full
0 OG File
0 Partial / Cut
0 Snippet
0 Unavailable		Whole Lotta Red [V1]
(Die Lit 2)		(May 11, 2018) - Die Lit is officially released
(June 3rd, 2018) - While previewing Buffy The Body, Carti says that Die Lit 2 is coming soon
(Aug 9, 2018) - Carti makes Skeleton, where he mentions Whole Lotta Red, making the name change from 'Die Lit 2' to 'Whole Lotta Red' official
(July 29, 2019) - Carti claims that he will try to drop in the next 60 days [1]
(October 2019) - Carti fails to drop in the next 60 days
The first iteration of Whole Lotta Red aimed for a very similar sound to Die Lit, with Carti rapping over cloudy trap beats, and producer Pi'erre Bourne reprising his role as the premier beatmaker for the album with one difference: his now-famous "Baby Voice," prominent on songs like "Pissy Pamper" and "Goku." Around a month after the release of Die Lit, Carti previewed "Buffy The Body" on a private account Instagram Live and announced he was working on Die Lit 2. In August of 2018, a video surfaced of Carti discussing the album, now referring to it as Whole Lotta Red.
669
Die Lit 2(May 11, 2018) - Die Lit is officially released
(June 3rd, 2018) - While previewing Buffie The Body, Carti says that Die Lit 2 is coming soon
(Aug 2018) - Carti mentions 'Whole Lotta Red' in an interview

676
Whole Lotta Red [V1]✨ Mosh Pit [V1]
(feat. NGeeYL) (prod. Goose The Guru)
(Die Like This)		OG Filename: Mosh Pit 7.18.18
Leaked on October 10, 2024. and there's no version with Offset, this rumor was debunked by Offset himself on a live stream. On 19/07/18 NGeeYL tweeted "I'm on carti ep ya'll go get it when it drop" & "Me & bra got summ else under our sleeves stay tuned". This version is a reimport of "Die Like This", as the original snippet for the song surfaced on June 30, 2018.		3:06October 10, 2024Jul 18, 2018DemoOG FileCD Qualityhttp://music.froste.lol/song/6d9a8811bbae9876a408431105bb4de4/play

Snippets and Full LQs
774
Whole Lotta Red [V1]🏆 Bitch Boy
(prod. Richie Souf)
(2.6 Boy, boi, B O Y)		"Bitch Boy" is a community grail and throwaway from "Whole Lotta Red" that was considered to feature on the album, but was never on any tracklist. It was previewed in a currently unreleased Whole Lotta Red 'documentary'. Richie Souf leaked the instrumental (rs_bitchboy.mp3), confirming the song name. A 2:30 minute LQ voice memo leaked on May 20, 2023. Many believe this song was made before June 2019, but the original beat is dated July 6, 2019, meaning the song was recorded much later.2:30May 20, 2023Jul 2019ThrowawayFullRecordinghttps://music.froste.lol/song/cf44c6f3a87801868fcabfc0fc9909a8/play
https://music.froste.lol/song/f108b346caa0bd8fa0dde5d962fa7d22/play

791
Whole Lotta Red [V1]🏆🥇 Tryna Get Down [V1]
(prod. Richie Souf)
(U Kan Get It, Get Down, The Holy Grail, THE Grail of All Grails)		Previewed by @metalgearsolid in an Instagram Story. Still teased by Richie Souf till this day. Often confused with the name "U Kan Get It" which is referring to the song U Kan Do It Too. One of the biggest grails in the Carti community. Richie leaked the beat in the Richie Grail zip, confirming the name as "Tryna Get Down." . The voice memo is dated April 13, 2019, so it's most likely from early April, though the original beat was made on February 9, 2019, meaning it could've been made anytime between February 9 and April 13. Technically apart of V1 due to being recorded before "Designer Shoes". Richie stated the song is held by 3 unnamed people who are not present in the community.

The audio file linked is the only legitimate available snippet of this song. No other snippets have surfaced since this was initially previewed.		N/AJune 23, 2020April 13, 2019ThrowawaySnippetRecordinghttps://music.froste.lol/song/94178425a1c2e536ddf6b0fc89041894
792

2 Unavailable		WE DON'T DIAL 911
(collaboration with Trippie Redd)
(14*29, 1429, Trippie Redd EP)		(Early 2019) - Carti and Trippie start working on a Collab EP
(Late 2019) - The EP is scrapped
Trippie Redd answered to a comment from a fan asking him for an EP with Carti "sooner than later", alongside posting potetional cover art for the project on his burner IG. The EP was actually likely worked on during 2019, due to Carti and Trippie having a lot of songs from this time. The album was later scrapped and the songs were either vaulted or given to smaller artists.

0 Unavailable		Whole Lotta Red [V2]
(Blonde Era, Baby Voice Era, Opium Era)		(Sep 30, 2019) - Carti fails to drop in "the next 60 days")
(Oct 16, 2019) - Landmark session happens
(April 16, 2020) - @ MEH releases and recieves poor reception
(June 28, 2020) - BigSosa, Carti's long-time friend passes sending Carti into a hiatus and causing a change of sound
The second iteration of Whole Lotta Red represents Carti's peak of experimentation, pushing his "baby voice" and high-pitched vocals to new extremes. He collaborated with Pi’erre Bourne, Richie Souf, and Maaly Raw, floating over a mix of heavenly synth beats and hard trap, but after mixed reactions to the V2 sound upon the release of "@ MEH" (everbody thought it was fucking shit), Carti scrapped and reworked the project before its final release. The cover art from this era comes from the @ MEH single, marking a transitional phase.

Carti also underwent a major aesthetic transformation, dyeing his hair blonde, switching from freeform dreads to re-twists, and embracing avant-garde fashion, especially Rick Owens. The upside-down cross became central to his imagery, linking him to his Opium collective. Though initially divisive, the V2 sound is now regarded as a fan-favorite, with many tracks considered grails, marking this as one of his most experimental and influential phases.
840
Post - 60 days(Sep 30, 2019) - Carti fails to drop in "the next 60 days"Technically these are all V1, but are considered by many in the community to be V2, so they are in here till further notice.

846
Whole Lotta Red [V2]⭐ u kan do it too. [V1]
(prod. Richie Souf & Art Dealer)
(U Kan Get It, U Can Do It Too)		OG Filename: u kan do it too. MAIN SING MASTER
"U Kan Do It Too" is an unreleased throwaway from "Whole Lotta Red", which was intended to be the lead single before being scrapped for "@ MEH". The file was mixed and mastered for release, aswell as having the paperwork and ASCAP filed. Submitted for copyright on October 10, 2019. Listed on DSPs as "u can do it too." on October 25, 2019, with the cover art being just a black square. It's unknown if this was meant to be the cover or just a placeholder. The song was recorded before October 2019, meaning that it might've been recorded during the 2019 V1 sessions; it was meant to release as the lead single for the reworked version of the album.		3:47Mar 28, 20232019Scrapped ReleaseOG FileLosslesshttp://music.froste.lol/song/17324f221d38302832c2e99ff510afd5/play

861
Whole Lotta Red [V2]Rich Nigga Shit*
(prod. Pi’erre Bourne & Kanye West)
(Amistad)		It was stated that Carti recorded on the same beat as "Rich Nigga Shit" by Young Thug & Juice WRLD, sometime during 2019-2020. However, the song was never sourced, so it remains lost.

This was actually worked by Kanye West and Pi'erre first, when they were working on the concept of "Hitler (LOVE EVERYONE)" (before the idea of "ye" was conceived). The lyrics used were found in the LOVE EVERYONE lyrics notepad, and it was performed for TMZ on April 26th 2018. Samples "Idea #36" by Raymond Scott. The chop was eventually reused and developed further for the Young Thug song		2:57Sep 7, 20252019-2020UnknownConfirmedNot Available

879
Whole Lotta Red [V2]@ MEH [V2]
(prod. Neeko Baby, Deskhop & ​jetsonmade)
(HELL)		OG Filename: Hell MAIN
Same mix as the release version of "@ MEH". "HELL" was the original name the song had, before being changed, just one day prior to its release. Listed on DSPs on April 15, 2020. 928
12 Total Full
7 OG File
0 Partial / Cut
3 Snippet
7 Unavailable		Whole Lotta Red [V3]
(Pre-Kanye)		(Apr 14, 2020) - @ MEH releases to poor reception from fans
(June 28th, 2020) - BigSosa, Carti's long-time friend passes away sending Carti into a hiatus?*
(Summer 2020) - Carti starts exploring a 'darker' sound
(November 2020) - Ye becomes executive producer and the album sound shifts
After the death of his friend Bigg Sosa, Carti takes more time to release the album and abandons social media until October, where he finally made his return to announce the rollout of his awaited second studio album Whole Lotta Red. We know that Carti isn't a really good lyricist, but on certain tracks, he talks about the grief he experienced when Bigg Sosa passed and expresses how he copes on songs like 'ILoveUIHateU,' where he opens up about his drug addiction. Songs during this era have more of a somber, relaxed tone compared to the rest of his works, abandoning his baby-voice for an early version of what we know as his raspy voice. This shift was partly driven by the immense hate and criticism he received for the baby-voice, pushing him to explore a darker and more aggressive vocal style. Leakers say that there was a September version of Whole Lotta Red with a finalized tracklist, but we will probably never hear what this version of the album sounded like.

Whole Lotta Red [V3]
957
11 Total Full
5 OG File
0 Partial / Cut
9 Snippet
22 Unavailable		Whole Lotta Red [V4]
(exec. prod. Kanye West)		(November 2020) - Ye becomes executive producer and the album sound shifts
(December 25, 2020) - Whole Lotta Red is officially released
In late 2020, Carti would shift the sound of Whole Lotta Red into being an aggressive ode to punk rock aesthetics, while maintaining the repetitive vocal style that made his previous work so loved. The album was his biggest musical departure by far, forgoing most of the things that brought him success in the first place, such as production from Pi'erre Bourne, or features from popular collaborators like Lil Uzi Vert or A$AP Rocky. Instead, the album would only see a handful of features, and would see production predominantly from F1LTHY & Art Dealer. Connecting to V3, on this album Carti talks about his acts violence, expressing how he felt when Bigg Sosa died (grief to anger). On songs like On That Time, Stop Breathing and No Sl33p, he opens up on how he felt, displaying anger, sometimes sadness and vengence for his friend. Ye would be the executive producer for the album, and it would see a release on Christmas Day, 2020.

0 Unavailable		Whole Lotta Red (Deluxe)(December 25, 2020) - Whole Lotta Red is officially released
(December 26, 2020) - Carti asks his fans on twitter what songs they want on the Deluxe.
(Early 2021) - Carti states that the deluxe will come in Spring 2021
(Spring 2021) - Deluxe is shelved
One day after Whole Lotta Red's release, Carti took to Twitter to ask fans which songs they wanted on the deluxe edition, marking the first time he had ever planned a deluxe release for one of his projects. Many of the songs considered for the deluxe were well-known leaks, alongside potential new tracks created specifically for the project. These songs underwent multiple tweaks and changes, such as mixing, mastering, and even name changes, in preparation for an official release. So far, two tracklist versions of the deluxe have been revealed by insiders and leakers, with speculation that more versions may exist but have yet to surface. Unfortunately, Carti eventually went silent about the deluxe, and the project was ultimately shelved. It is rumored that the label did not allow him to release the deluxe, forcing him to abandon the project in favor of focusing on his next album, NARCISSIST.
1006
Sessions after Whole Lotta Red's release
Dec 26, 2020 - March, 2021

(prod. F1LTHY, Lukrative & ssort)
(All Night, Tsunami)		Speculated to have been intended for the Whole Lotta Red deluxe. It was first previewed on March 1, 2021, by one of Carti's team members on his Instagram story. 0 Total Full
0 OG File
0 Partial / Cut
0 Snippet
0 Unavailable		Ye - DONDA
(Balaclava Era, DONDA: WITH CHILD, DND WTH CHLD, DND, God's Country, The First Born Donda)		(Dec 2020) - Ye & Playboi Carti start working together on Donda
(Aug 29, 2021) - Donda is officially released on all streaming services
Donda was an opportunity used by Carti as a "rollout" to showcase his new, somewhat softer, and more relaxed sound used on his now-scrapped album "Narcissist". Based on snippets and leaks, Ye West not only helped Carti develop a foundation for the album, but he also gave inspiration and introduced him to the sounds he uses today. Despite the non-launch of Narcissist, Carti used Donda as a stepping stone to his new works of music.
1051
DONDA [V1](Dec 2020) - Ye and Carti start working together
(March 7, 2021) - CyHi confirms that Ye has resumed the work on the album
1052

(feat. Playboi Carti & Justin Austin) (prod. Ojivolta)		OG Filename: Made It - 12.23.20 JA Classic Only
Version of "Made It" featuring Playboi Carti, with Ojivolta production and Justin Austin vocals similar to their work on "God Breathed". Likely made in the same session as "Off The Grid". Playboi Carti's verse is 40 seconds long, and said to be "excellent". DondaYe - Off The Grid [V19]
(feat. Playboi Carti) (prod. 30 Roc, Ojivolta)		Around the time of WLR premiere, a fan snuck into Ye's house and recorded a part of Carti's verse. 1093
DondaYe - Off The Grid [V20]
(ref. Fya Man) (feat. Playboi Carti) (prod. 30 Roc)		OG Filename: Off the Grid 7.26.21- FYA MAN HK AND VERSE
Version of "Off The Grid" made July 26th, 2021. Features more Carti vocals, and has Fya Man on the hook of the song doing reference vocals. Fya Man himself has said that he did "co-writing" for the track. Snippet leaked March 23rd, 2023. 47 Total Full
24 OG File
2 Partial / Cut
10 Snippet
26 Unavailable		Narcissist(Early 2021) - Whole Lotta Red (Deluxe) gets shelved
(March 10, 2021) - Carti posts about wanting to drop soon
(July 7, 2021) - Carti goes to the Mercedez Benz Stadium, to work on Donda
(August 23, 2021) - Carti posts fit pic on IG captioned: "NARCISSIST 09/13/21"
(September 13, 2021) - NARCISSIST does not get released
(Mar 2, 2022) - First known Guapo voice song is recorded
After shelving the WLR Deluxe, Carti entered his most mysterious era. He announced Narcissist for September 13, 2021, but it never dropped due to sample clearance issues and its similarities to Future’s sound. Fans speculated the album might be called Mollyworld after a fit pic caption, but Narcissist was the final name. The project hinted at a futuristic, sample-heavy sound, blending Carti’s fading “baby voice” with a developing deeper tone — a shift later heard on Travis Scott’s “FE!N.” Leaks like “Ready to Crash” and “Too Hot” showcased his evolving style. Despite a producer lineup that included Richie Souf, F1lthy, and Art Dealer, the album was scrapped, and the tour was renamed King Vamp. The only official release was a controversial merch line. Despite multiple sources claiming it's not an album, Carti posted a screenshot revealing the existence of this album.
1112
Full
1113
Narcissist⭐ Sights
(with A$AP Rocky) (prod. evilgiane & BABYXSOSA)
(OUR DE$TINY)		OG Filename: pbc x flacko 5.2.21 2
On September 2, 2022, A$AP Rocky uploaded the song to his Instagram along with its music video. On September 7, 2022, controversy started when opiumbaby called out and dissed Rocky for "leaking the song", saying that Carti didn’t approve the track's release and that it was Carti's song, not Rocky's. Fritz Owens later confirmed this. OGF with an open verse would end up leaking on September 9, 2022. Rocky later performed the song at Rolling Loud New York on September 25, 2022. Much later in 2023, when Rocky was asked about the song in an interview, he explained that he posted it because "They just kept leaking it, so we just said 'fuck it' and put it out", despite the fact that the song was completely unheard up until the moment Rocky leaked it himself. The track samples "If" by Destiny's Child and "Dirty White Speaks / Make Em Say Huh" by Rick Ross.		4:23Dec 9, 2022May 2, 2021ThrowawayOG FileCD Qualityhttp://music.froste.lol/song/1397ebeda47931395fda5ee12049fe94/play

30 Unavailable		MUSIC [V1](Sep 13, 2021) - Playboi Carti fails to release 'Narcissist'
(Mar 10, 2022) - Playboi Carti reveals the album is now called 'MUSIC' in a interview with XXL
(Dec 24, 2022) - Playboi Carti ends his social media hiatus by posting what is believed to be the album cover on Instagram
(Dec 29, 2022) - Playboi Carti gets arrested on domestic violence charges, forcing Carti to push back the album from an alleged Jan 13, 2023 release date.
In early 2023, anticipation for Playboi Carti’s next album was through the roof. He had just previewed “ROCKSTAR” at Rolling Loud California, and it felt like the album could drop any week. Around this time, DJ Swamp Izzo emerged as a trusted insider in the Carti community, sharing key info in DMs with a fan. He claimed Carti had a few possible titles in mind, despite previously teasing the name MUSIC in 2022, and said the official title would drop in two weeks—which never happened. This led to speculation about whether this was a new project, or just MUSIC under a different name. Swamp also mentioned that about 25 tracks were in consideration and hinted at an April or May release. Swamp stated that he would speak over each song—something that later became a main gimmick of MUSIC when it released—and that the sound for the tape was inspired by Lil Wayne, with Carti blending all of his sounds together with a touch of 2000s Atlanta trap. After two grueling years of constant blueballing, Carti finally dropped MUSIC, and once it was out, more details surfaced about the behind-the-scenes process. In an April 2025 interview, Swamp Izzo revealed Carti had completed an entire tape by the end of 2022—but no tracks from it made the final tracklist for MUSIC.
1208
Full
1209
MUSIC [V1]⭐ BELIEVE ME
(prod. Roark Bailey)
(STRESS, Planet X)		Snippet leaked on August 13, 2024. Was supposed to be groupbought, instead of "HOMIXIDE55555"; the server owners ran the buy believing this was the song to be acquired. It was ultimately an elaborate scam that the middleman (tune) perpetrated with the seller so that they could sell a less desirable song for a higher profit.

Samples "It's Ok, You're Ok" by Bonjr, which itself samples "Seven Forty Seven" by Boards Of Canada. The surfaced file is cut, missing a very small portion of the outro. The audio quailty is also degraded as the result of being ripped from a video. The rumor about the cut part of the song being a missing beat switch is false; only about 3 seconds in total were cut and the actual rumor itself about the song having a beat swtich was spread by Soul (not the owners), who is known to spread misinformation. The seller also lied about the song having Clams Casino production. The real producer is Roark Bailey. Leaked on Aug 4, 2025.		2:20Aug 4, 2025Aug ~, 2022High Bitrate RipCutHigh Qualityhttps://music.froste.lol/song/0d3b62b29d6483cfe0254a972c220b0f
1210
MUSIC [V1]⭐ HEARD Y'ALL GETTING MONEY
(prod. KP Beatz & Jonah Abraham)
(Getting Money)		Snippet shared by the same crypto scammer as the one who shared a CDQ snip of "PROBLEM CHILD". Most likely finished. Recorded in 2023. Uses the same beat as "King Tonka" by Yeat. Confirmed by an insider to be called "HEARD Y'ALL GETTING MONEY". Was heavily promoted by King Bob through many posts on Twitter similarly to Different Day around new year's of 2024. Leaked in full on June 15, 2024 with the Yeat song stitched together. We have all the vocals but the open is unleaked so technically it's a partial leak. The file is ~128kbps.4:13Jun 15, 20242022ThrowawayTaggedHigh Qualityhttp://music.froste.lol/song/226859be88766b5cee1784e16b145138/play

MUSIC [V1]✨ NUMB [V1]
(feat. Sunday Service Choir) (prod. Ojivolta, KP Beatz & ssort)
(LOVEGOTMENUMB, DRUGS GOT ME NUMB)		OG Filename: pbc 3-15-23 4 KP IZZO
Previewed by Carti on his alt IG, @opium_00pium, as a trailer for MUSIC. Previously thought to be from mid 2023 (MUSIC V2). Seems to be either the intro to this early version of MUSIC or for the other project worked with Izzo. Was thought to end up on BABY BOI, but this now seems unlikely. Many of Izzo's adlibs were reused in "ALIVE" (and many other songs too), and the choir was used in the live intro/interlude of "OMERTÀ*". The song was group bought by Carti Hub for 11k and later surfaced on July 11, 2025.

The song is not a demo.		3:09Jul 11, 2025Mar 15, 2023Scrapped ReleaseFullHigh Qualityhttps://music.froste.lol/song/a7b556af65ea2333dc09ed98d5d51c90

(prod. KP Beatz)
(Plutonium, I Can't Change)		OG Filename: pbc 12-27-22 KP

MUSIC [V1]⭐ WICKED
(prod. Cardo Got Wings & Chef9thegod)
(Killers, Pockets, 250 Dash) 		OG Filename: pbc 3-2-22
According to Carti's manager, "WICKED" was planned to be the lead single for "MUSIC" for unspecified amount of time and was supposed to drop 3 weeks after it leaked. Leaked after a succesful groupbuy to which half of the sum was contributed by community goat Hells. Later also previewed on OVO Radio. Recorded on March 2nd 2022. Was confirmed to officially be called 'WICKED' in an interview with Cardo Got Wings. This is the song Carti discussed during his XXL interview; the first time it was ever known that Carti was changing his flow. Was confirmed by Cardo Got Wings to be on his album, but did not end up releasing.		2:22Sep 1, 2023Mar 2, 2022Scrapped ReleaseOG FileCD Qualityhttps://music.froste.lol/song/ec81a6c75eace9153153282ba637dffb/play

MUSIC [V1][Unknown Jan. 13, 2023 Album Copy]Per Heavenorhell, the rollout Playboi Carti had started in late December 2022 was going to lead up to the album's release on January 13, 2023, with even private listening parties being set up for this copy. 1283
4 Total Full
4 OG File
0 Partial / Cut
2 Snippet
6 Unavailable		004KT
(Collaboration with YoungBoy Never Broke Again)		(~2022) - The project is conceived
(June 2023) - Carti posts a picture of YoungBoy wearing an opium chain on his story
(April 16, 2024) - YoungBoys home is raided and he is arrested, later indicted and convicted of running a large scale drug ring. Project likely scrapped around this time
(March 24, 2025) - YoungBoy is released from federal prison and Carti posts a picture of YoungBoy wearing a opium chain on his story again
(May 20, 2025) - Carti reposts YB again
(May 21st, 2025) - ALIVE is released
004KT, stylized a 004KTWHOYOUHATE?, is a (likely scrapped) collaboration project between Playboi Carti and NBA Youngboy, first teased in February 2023 when DJ Swamp Izzo claimed that 'YoungBoys tape with Carti is almost done'. Then, in the summer of 2023, Carti gifted YoungBoy an opium chain and then posted a picture of YoungBoy wearing the chain. F1LTHY also tweeted the words '004KT' (00 meaning Opium and 4KT standing for YoungBoys label) hinting at his potetional involvement in a collaboration between the two. The album was in the works up until early 2024, when YoungBoy was raided and arrested for running a large scale drug ring.

20 Total Full

18 Unavailable		Cave Era
(MUSIC [V2], Cave Sessions)		(Dec 29, 2022) - Playboi Carti gets arrested on domestic violence charges, forcing Carti to push back the album from an alleged Jan 13, 2023 release date.
(June 2023) - Carti tours across Europe, temporarily resides in Paris for the cave sessions where he records more 'experimental' music.
(August 2023) - Carti leaves the cave causing a switch of sound.
(August 31, 2023) - Antagonist Tour get's postponed.
(Sep 1, 2023) - Carti plans to release WICKED as the lead single alongside a Music Video 3 weeks aftter the plan was conceived. The same day the song gets leaked online causing Carti to scrap it.
After the rollout for the 'GUAPO' era of MUSIC died down, Carti would go back into a hiatus, however, this wouldn't last for long, as Carti was booked for multiple festivals across Europe in the summer of 2023. And during this time of being in Europe, Carti would rent out a cave in Paris, and record various songs there. The songs recorded here were more experimental, and not like the rest of his music. Songs like POP OUT, MEET YO MAKER, and DOCTOR were all recorded in these caves, and most of the songs recorded here were produced by either Pi'erre Bourne or F1LTHY. Carti would eventually end up going back on this cave sound and exploring a darker theme, the only songs from this era (that we know of atleast) seeing an official release being POP OUT and OLYMPIAN.

The cover for this era is actually a fake cover after the creator behind the cover lied about "cartis team considering it", when in reality it was only an auto-reply email.The cover was originally posted on IG as a fan art. Inspired by “Eaten Back To Life” by Cannibal Corpse.

Cave Era⭐ MÉNAGE [V2]
(with Lil Uzi Vert) (prod. F1LTHY & mochila)		A grail since its first snippet surfaced. It was initially believed by many to be an AI/Fake track. The real file has only 1:20 minutes of vocals, and an open verse. This file, has the vocals looped over the open verse instead. Which means that this is technically a partial leak,since it was modified from it's original state. The sessions for this song are in the hands of leakers who claim that the song was never finished.

For some time, there was a fake filename that claimed that this track was made on May of 2022. Which was completely illogical, since both artists had a way different flow back then. This got supported by @uzirareupdates revealing the real recording dates; with Carti recording his only part (the chorus) on May of 2023 (alongside 'FOMDJ'), and Uzi one day before the Pink Tape got released. So there's a chance that this track was another scrapped feature from Carti for Uzi's album, that didn't obviously make the cut.		2:51Apr 30, 2024Jun 29, 2023ThrowawaySelf-BounceHigh Qualityhttps://music.froste.lol/song/5ccfa62a1d4ae0ced6725edd84703ba5

Cave Era✨ MEET YO MAKER
(prod. Tommy Wright III & X-Rated Al)
(MEET YO MAKER (REMIX), TOMMY, MYM, MEET YOUR MAKER)		A remix of Tommy Wright III's 1994 song of the same name. A snippet of the music video with the song surfaced on August 13, 2024, hyping up the idea of Carti trying to do more "experimental" tracks. Photos from the MV shoot leaked on October 17, 2023. Put up for GB for $9,000, but was later force-leaked for free. The filename that had leaked was fake; the file that leaked was actually ripped from the unreleased music video and heavily degraded. The video itself would later leak on September 4, 2025. Recorded during the same session as ON B5 and CUM*. The music video OG File, was leaked by Vad_3r on October 25, 2025. The audio stream of the video had the MYM file in CDQ, which was ripped pefectly by luvsy999.3:30Jun 20, 2025Jun 16, 2023High Bitrate RipFullCD Qualityhttps://pixeldrain.com/u/uzxS1DNP

Features
1315
Cave Era✨ Drake - K-9 [V3]
(feat. Playboi Carti) (prod. Scott Bridgeway, Nasamadeit, F1LTHY & Glasear)
(SLIDE, SLIDING, SLIDE IN, READY OR NOT)		OG Filename: K-9 NOEL REF
Drake's part was first previewed by Swamp Izzo in a club on June 25, 2025; albeit an updated version. It was then confirmed to have a beat switch to Carti's part when another snippet surfaced on Oct 15, 2025 by cold. Adin Ross would then play another snippet of Drake's verse on KICK on November 10, 2025.

Was originally considered for a release on Drake's 2023 "For All The Dogs" before being scrapped for unknown reasons. Was also considered for a release on the March 14th, 2025 version of "MUSIC" (via DJ Akademiks) but was most likely scrapped due to Kendrick Lamar's influence on the album.

The instrumental of Drake's part comes from a Nasamadeit beat uploaded to YouTube, which samples "A House Is Not A Home" by Luther Vandross. [1]
In fact, this track is basically a stem edit made by Drake's team, combining his song "K-9" with Carti's track "READY OR NOT".

CDQ leaked for free on November 22, 2025 after it had been private bought. Shortly after surfacing, F1LTHY validated the concept of "the Cave Era", by commenting that it was actually recorded in the infamous cave in France. [2].		4:50Nov 22, 2025Aug ~, 2023FeatureFullCD Qualityhttp://music.froste.lol/song/38cc1235a5acab8889abe88c8ba2d1c6/play

1 Unavailable		CARTI YE(October 2023) Carti starts working with Ye on Vultures in Italy
(March 15th, 2025) Ye confirms that the collab album exists and got scrapped because of the beef between them
CARTI YE is a collaborative project between Playboi Carti and Kanye West. Little is known of the album, except that sessions for the project took place and it was ultimately scrapped. Kanye posted the album cover on X on March 15, 2025, alongside confirming that the project was discontinued. Later on December 11, 2025, on a stream with Cuffem, F1LTHY would come out months later (Dec 11, 2025) and claim that it was actually a track meant for their scrapped collaborative album "CARTI YE". So Ye uploading it without Carti was part of the episode he was having at the time, starting a beef with Carti. YoungBoy for his part, decided to stick to Carti's side. Which would bring back the 004KT duo from 2022-2023 to the public, generating more anticipation for their future tracks together. He actually had the song for himself in the start, before the other two added their own contributions.

61 Unavailable		MUSIC
(MUSIC [V3], I AM MUSIC)		(October 2023) - Carti heads over to Italy to record for VULTURES
(Nov 2023) - The 'MUSIC' sessions begin
(Jan 5, 2024) - MUSIC supposedly is meant to drop, it does not
(Mar 27, 2024) - Carti stays quiet after his last feature on the intial rollout.
(Dec 15, 2024) - A partial LP for the album is held at Rolling Loud, with another failed launch date between Dec 25 and January 2025
(March 14th, 2025) - MUSIC officially releases on all platforms
Playboi Carti's third studio album, MUSIC, was released on March 14, 2025. After a failed rollout in January 2023, Carti revamped the album concept, embracing a darker, gothic, and metal-inspired musical aesthetic. This new sound was driven by gritty beats, mainly produced by Cardo Got Wings, and a mix of deep, menacing vocal delivery with his signature whispery, melodic style.

In 2023, Carti largely went silent, resurfacing in July with a feature on Travis Scott's UTOPIA on the track "FE!N," which showcased his newly adopted deep vocal tone. In December 2023, he dropped the first single, "DIFFERENT DAY," followed by "2024," which highlighted both his vocal range and a shift toward sample-based production. Singles like "HBA," "BACKR00MS" with Travis Scott, "EVIL J0RDAN," and "KETAMINE" continued to generate anticipation. He also featured on major projects, including VULTURES 1 and We Don't Trust You, maintaining his presence in the spotlight. The album's release in March 2025 was highly anticipated, marking a significant evolution in Carti's sound. This was also the first time Carti has incorporated AI into his music, using Keith Lawson to record songs for him and run it through a filter to turn it into his voice. Songs like RATHER LIE and FINE SHIT are very clearly AI tracks.

MUSIC [V3]VETEMENTS Jeans [V2]
(with Lil Uzi Vert) (prod. Maaly Raw, Ambezza & OUTOFAIR)
(JUSTIN BIEBER, By Myself)		After Vetements Jeans was scrapped from Pink Tape, it was considered and updated for MUSIC, before being scrapped from the project. First previewed in a short snippet played by DJ Swamp Izzo on @lilbankhead’s Instagram Live — in honor of Playboi Carti’s 28th birthday. An attempt was made to preview the track on the V-103 radio show on September 13, 2023, however, due to Playboi Carti hanging up on Izzo, they had to delay the event until the following day. Carti “switched up” and prevented the station from playing the song on September 14. The only thing that is known about this version is that it features a DJ Swamp Izzo intro. N/ASep 13, 2023N/AThrowawaySnippetRecordinghttps://pixeldrain.com/u/yDPPitE7

MUSIC [V3]🥉 Future - TRIM [V1]
(feat. Playboi Carti & Travis Scott) (prod. TM88, Akachi, DJ Moon, Sonickaboom, C$D Sid & Macnificent)
(Really I'm Trim)		A video of Carti listening to a song with DJ Swamp Izzo tag and Future feature while arriving late for Clout festival surfaced on Jul 17, 2024. Partial LQ surfaced July 18th, 2024. Allegedly scrapped from Future's next album Mixtape Pluto. Song was offered to Hells who then stalled and ended up leaving. Billboards spotted saying 'TRIM' in LA, possibly relating to the song. Later released on MUSIC with a new Carti verse, a bunch of Swamp Izzo tags, and awful mixing. It's also been confirmed that this former version has a Travis Scott verse (yet to be heard) that got scrapped for the official release.N/AJul 18, 2024N/AUnknownPartialRecordinghttps://music.froste.lol/song/131ef4e4f5af58e1c99137a9e9f08068

0 Total Full
0 OG File
0 Partial / Cut
0 Snippet
0 Unavailable		VULTURES
(Bad Bitch Playbook, ¥$)		(Mid 2023) - The project is concieved
(October 2023) - Carti starts working with Ye on Vultures in Italy
(Feb 10, 2024) - Vultures 1 is officially released on all streaming services
(Aug 3, 2024) - Vultures 2 is officially released on all streaming services
(Early 2025) - Vultures 3 is announced to still be work in progress (please god no,why)
(Early 2025) - Ty finally gets sick of Ye and scraps the project
Carti was a frequent collaborator, for Ye and Ty Dolla $ign's joint trilogy (cut by two volumes), Vultures. 'MUSIC' was even delayed, because of the delays and reworks these albums had. During this sub-era, Carti would do some changes to his own project, due to Ye's influence. Eventhough only a very few songs were released or leaked, it's believed that 'the Vultures' and Carti may have worked on so much more material together.
1524
VULTURES 1(Mid 2023) - The project is concieved
(October 2023) - Carti starts working with Ye on Vultures in Italy
(Feb 10, 2024) - Vultures 1 is officially released on all streaming services

VULTURES✨ ¥$ - MELROSE [V3]
(feat. Playboi Carti) (Prod. TheLabCook & OjiVolta)
(Codeine)		OG Filename: melrose_
211 (a known seller) offered the song which is over 5 minute long, with a longer Carti verse version for groupbuy, confirming its existence. A snippet later posted by Luit and the song has been added to the MELROSE buy. Has fuller chorus, Ty is doing more than just adlibs and one line and Carti's verse is 3 times longer. Mixed terribly by Fritz Owens. Features a line where Carti disses Ye - "Cock it back aim it a nazi". 1586
10 Total Full
1 OG File
5 Partial / Cut
14 Snippet
42 Unavailable		BABY BOI
(ANTAGONIST 2.0, BBYBOI)		(January 2023) - The concept of 2 albums dropping back to back is conceived.
(March 14, 2025) - MUSIC releases on all DSPs.
(March 15, 2025) - Carti posts a screenshot of the Apple Music charts with the caption "BABY BOI OTW" on Instagram.
(May 21, 2025) - ALIVE & SOME MORE release on Instagram.
(September 2025) - BABY BOI is supposed to release before the Antagonist 2.0 Tour starts but doesn't due to clearances issues.
(Ongoing)
In 2023, Carti would confirm in a facetime call that he planned to drop 2 albums; MUSIC and BABY BOI. The plans for BABY BOI are unknown, however, Carti has alluded to it multiple times after the release of MUSIC, claiming it will come soon. Insiders have also said the album will drop before the end of 2025, with Carti consistently reitterating that it will drop before the end of 2025 aswell. It was planned to drop but was cancelled.
1587
Full
1588
BABY BOI✨ ALIVE [V3]
(with YoungBoy Never Broke Again) (prod. Ye, F1LTHY & Lucian)
(CRANK)		Posted on Carti's opium_00pium account on May 21st, captioned "DIS MY SONG LIL BRA @ye". Which was a response to Ye, once he took the song and uploaded it to his IG; seemingly stealing it from Carti. However F1LTHY would come out months later (Dec 11, 2025) and claim that it was actually a track meant for their scrapped collaborative album "CARTI YE" [1]. So Ye uploading it without Carti was part of the episode he was having at the time, starting a beef with Carti. YoungBoy for his part, decided to stick to Carti's side. Which would bring back the 004KT duo from 2022-2023 to the public, generating more anticipation for their future tracks together. He actually had the song for himself in the start, before the other two added their own contributions.

The track was then deleted 2 days later and reuploaded after some time. Here, Carti introduces a new, very pitched down and deep voice, as an evolution to his Future-esque interpolation from 2022 and 2023. Samples Carti's album track "CRANK", mostly Swamp Izzo's adlibs, which serve as the base for this track. The almost perfect rip we have, was done by @luvsy999.		3:28May 21, 20252025High Bitrate RipFullHigh Qualityhttps://music.froste.lol/song/edf4a64e66318999a55c12cadcac398f
1589
BABY BOI✨ SOME MORE
(prod. Playboi Carti, KP Beatz, Lucian, Jasper Harris & Aaron Shadrow)
(DIS SHIT EASY, ONCE MORE)		The second song dropped on Cartis burner IG, on 5/21/2025. It's likely intended to be a single or a throwaway for 'BABY BOI'. Uses a more toned down version of the voice heard in ALIVE. According to F1LTHY, the song is produced by Carti himself, and titled 'SOME MORE'. Seemingly recorded right after his assistance at the Met Gala. Almost perfect RIP by @luvsy999.1:56May 21, 2025May ~, 2025High Bitrate RipFullHigh Qualityhttps://music.froste.lol/song/730e107ac2933ff5181a9cb0ac635c8f

BABY BOIROCKSTARZ [V2]
(prod. F1LTHY & Ojivolta)
(R0CKST4R, ROCKSTAR)		Reworked version of ROCKSTARZ with alternate production, intro and (unfortunately) Swamp Izzo adlibs likely intended for release. 2 CDQ snippets were surfaced on Oct 11, 2025 by rawflame73. These snippets were initially believed to be AI but were verified by Raahim and other holders to be legit. Length of the song was revealed by @stage.

According to Purple Matter, it was supposed to drop February 23, 2024 [1], but (according to his assumption) was delayed due to Ye's "Vultures 1" [2].
Name confirmed to be ROCKSTARZ by a leaked official set list picture [3].		1:51Oct 11, 2025N/AScrapped ReleaseSnippetCD Quality

BABY BOI[Unknown Lil Uzi Vert Collaborations]Many people were speculating and getting hyped off the idea that Uzi would be a guest at Playboi Carti's 'ANTAGONIST' show, in Philly (November 10, 2025). However, this did not happen. Meek Mill turned out to be the special guest, despite Uzi's team being present at the venue. And yet, Carti did shoutout Uzi ("16*29 FOREVER"). He even stated: "I just saw my best friend Uzi", while also shouting out Maaly Raw. Even though there's a chance the two have finally got back to work together, this can also be very unlikely.N/ANov 10, 20252025UnknownRumoredNot AvailableN/A

⭐ (Best Of) - These songs are gernerally considered to be the best leaks that are on the tracker.
✨ (Special) - Standout tracks that aren't good enough to belong in Best Of.
🏆 (Grails) - The most wanted songs that haven't yet leaked in full.
🥉 (Wanted) - Songs that are considered grails by some members of the community; "mini grails".
🗑️ (Worst Of) - Songs that the community considers to be the worst tracks that Carti has recorded.

Tracker Guidelines
1700
1. Put music videos, and everything unreleased that isn't a song, art, stems, or a tracklist, in misc.
1701
2. When adding a new era (or recoloring/renaming the era), use conditional formatting (right-click → View more cell actions → Conditional formatting). Otherwise, it won't work on the TrackerHub app.
1702
3. To edit anything in Best Of, Special, Grails, Wanted, Worst Of, AI Ref Tracks, Recent, Recently Recorded, or OG Files, edit it in Unreleased. Those sections work as filters, filtering through the Unreleased section by adding all songs that meet the corresponding emoji or criteria, such as Leak Date, File Date, or the OG File having an Available Length.
1703
4. Use imgur.gg for all links, because KrakenFiles links are deleted after some time. If something can't be uploaded to imgur.gg due to large file size, then use kraken or Mega.
1704
5. Check if the song/mv/whatever is already added before you add it.
1705
If you got any problems with the tracker or would like something changed you can join discord.gg/jordancarter and create a thread in #tracker-suggestions
